name: Holo Stream
summary: Live streaming, recording and a creator coin composited in the browser.

description.p: Going live and recording shouldn't depend on desktop software or a streaming host.
Compose a scene from your screen, windows, camera and mic, mix the audio, then record a content-addressed clip or broadcast over a serverless relay.

ul: Scene composition display, window, camera, mic
Go live over a serverless relay

releases.description: Go Live as a Channel: Owncast-style content-addressed LL-HLS + live chat + a pump.fun-style creator coin where every trade pays the streamer.
